description: Unique ID for each record of the dataset
Unique ID for each project. Multiple records may have the same Project ID if the project has multiple segments.
Name of the project
Name or identifier of the specific segments of a project, if relevant
Project owner
Project status (Planning; Engineering, design, and routing; Permitting; Construction; Complete; On hold; Terminated)
Date that project status was last updated
Type of project (New circuit, greenfield; New circuit, existing ROW; Rebuild; Upgrade; Reconductor)
Type of line (Aboveground; Underground; Mixed)
Minimum voltage, in kilovolts (kV)
Maximum voltage, in kilovolts (kV)
Specification of whether the line carries Alternating Current (AC) or Direct Current (DC)
Total project capacity, in megawatts (MW)
Estimated year that the line will be in service
Federal permitting status
State permitting status
Date that permitting status was last updated
Federal permitting simple status
State permitting simple status
Alternative project name, if relevant
Substation the project originates at
Substation the project terminates at
All substations known to be involved in the project
All states intersected by the planned project
All states intersected by the planned project, with states abbreviated
All regional transmission organizations (RTOs) intersected by the planned project
Planning authority overseeing the project, if any
Transmission planning process that the planned project is part of, if any
Transmission planning portfolio that the planned project is part of, if any
Length of the planned route, in miles
Source of length data, whether gathered from a project description or calculated by Horizon (Reported; Estimated)
Link to information on the project
Link to additional information on the project
Unique ID for each substation
Name of substation
Original name of the substation, if the substation was present in the Homeland Infrastructure Foundation Level Database 'Electrical Substations' dataset
Original substation ID, if the substation was present in the Homeland Infrastructure Foundation Level Database 'Electrical Substations' dataset
State the substation is located in, abbreviated
State the substation is located in
Latitude, in decimal degrees
Longitude, in decimal degrees
Maximum voltage at the substation currently (before planned project)
Minimum voltage at the substation currently (before planned project)
List of planned project(s) that the substation is involved in. Note, this field is not exhaustive.
Voltage of planned project that the substation is involved in, in kilovolts (kV). If the substation is involved in multiple planned projects, this fields reflects the highest voltage project.
Specification of whether the substation was present in the original HIFLD dataset, or whether it was added by Horizon. (Listed in HIFLD; Not listed in HIFLD; New build, not listed in HIFLD)
Specification of whether the substation is already existing or is a new build.
